label: Splunk
description: Run SPL searches, acknowledge notable events, or push events via HEC against Splunk Enterprise / Splunk Cloud REST APIs.

settings.name: operation
settings.label: Operation
settings.description: search — run SPL and return events; alert_ack — acknowledge a notable event; notable_create — push event via HEC.

validation.errorMessage: Host must start with http:// or https://

settings.name: token
settings.label: Auth token / HEC token
settings.description: Splunk session token or HEC token. Use {{secret:splunk_token}} to reference a workflow secret.

settings.name: allowInsecure
settings.label: Allow insecure TLS (dev/sandbox only)
settings.description: When true, TLS certificate verification is disabled. Only use in dev or sandbox environments.

settings.name: spl
settings.label: SPL query
settings.description: Search Processing Language query. Required when operation=search.
settings.placeholder: index=main sourcetype=access_combined status=500 | stats count by host

settings.name: earliestTime
settings.label: Earliest time
settings.description: Splunk earliest time modifier (e.g. -15m, -1h@h). Only used when operation=search.

settings.name: latestTime
settings.label: Latest time
settings.description: Splunk latest time modifier. Only used when operation=search.

settings.name: maxResults
settings.label: Max results
settings.description: Maximum number of events returned by the search job. Only used when operation=search.

settings.name: timeout
settings.label: Search timeout (ms)
settings.description: Maximum time to wait for a search job to complete. Only used when operation=search.

settings.name: notableId
settings.label: Notable event ID
settings.description: ID of the Splunk notable event to acknowledge. Required when operation=alert_ack.

settings.name: comment
settings.label: Acknowledgement comment
settings.description: Optional comment to attach to the acknowledgement. Only used when operation=alert_ack.

settings.name: assignee
settings.label: Assignee
settings.description: Optional user to assign the notable to during acknowledgement. Only used when operation=alert_ack.

settings.name: event
settings.label: HEC event payload (JSON)
settings.description: Event object to send via HEC. Required when operation=notable_create.

settings.name: index
settings.label: Splunk index
settings.description: Target index for the HEC event. Only used when operation=notable_create.

settings.name: sourcetype
settings.label: Sourcetype
settings.description: Sourcetype for the HEC event. Only used when operation=notable_create.

ai.shortDescription: Run SPL searches, acknowledge Splunk notable events, or push events via HEC.
ai.whenToUse: During incident triage (search for errors/alerts in Splunk), alert workflow automation (acknowledge notables after remediation), or when you need to create new notable events in Splunk from workflow data.
ai.examplePrompt: search Splunk for HTTP 500s in the last 15 minutes and return the top hosts
ai.promptHints: Use operation=search with an SPL query for log triage. Use operation=alert_ack to close Splunk notables after auto-remediation. Use operation=notable_create to push workflow-detected issues as Splunk notable events via HEC. Set token={{secret:splunk_token}} to use a workflow secret.

outputAssertions.name: notable_create_success
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Splunk operation failed — notable_create returned non-success or alert_ack was rejected.
